list_ref:{'id': 'artifact_preview_availability_mismatch', 'severity': 'medium', 'description': 'The grader\'s limitations state that "Artifact content previews were not available in the grading packet, so verification ... was based on trace and metadata rather than direct artifact inspection." However the artifact_content_previews include a text preview for attempts/baseline/final_message.txt. The claim that no previews were available is therefore inaccurate. This does not invalidate the grader\'s trace-based judgments (the CSV itself was not previewed), but the limitation statement should be corrected to reflect that at least the final_message preview was available.', 'evidence_refs': ['artifact_content_previews:attempts/baseline/final_message.txt', 'grader_result.limitations'], 'recommendation': 'Update the limitations text to accurately state which previews were available (final_message.txt preview present; CSV preview not provided).'}
